name: Laruaville 2
short_description: The moon has fallen from the sky and it needs to be fixed! To fix the moon, you need a Scientist and a Manager. And, of course, a big town to build and lots of Match 3 skills. This game includes Match 3 levels as well as some Mahjongs and Solitaires and a cool story.
detailed_description:
The moon has fallen from the sky and it needs to be fixed!
To fix the moon, you need a Scientist and a Manager.
And, of course, a big town to build and lots of Match 3 skills.
This game includes Match 3 levels as well as some Mahjongs and Solitaires and a cool story.
In our games all Mahjongs are "simplified" so if you don't like the traditional Mahjong, we suggested you try ours.
The same applies to Solitaire games.
about_the_game:
